node.html:
• Contributed to the fork of the open source pdf generation library ReactPdf and to the type racing platform Razor
  • Write modern, performant, maintainable code for a diverse array of client and internal projects utilizing technologies such as Angular, React, NodeJS & Flask and various other technologies
  • Mentored and guided an intern through successfully completing a project, overseeing its planning, execution, and completion.
  • Collaborated on the enhancement of Saas product of a client, optimizing its performance and efficiency through the implementation of web workers and algorithmic improvements.

• Researched on time series modeling and anomaly detection domain
  • Improved my academic reading, writing and analytical skills through literature reviews and workshops.
  • Worked with various machine learning and deep learning tools and framework including TensorFlow, scikit-learn, pandas, numpy and matplotlib

• Developed and deployed a PWA using Angular, Node.js, and MongoDB to streamline patient triage process, facilitating the daily assessment of around 150 patients.
  • Worked on the modernization of legacy Hospital Information System which is built with JavaEE, Oracle DB.
  • Automated transfer of employee time sheets from the biometric devices to the ERP using Python. Which eliminated conflicts and reduced the synchronization time from ~4 hours to 5 minutes.
  • Provided support in network/server deployments and other SysAdmin tasks
